inputs.label: Focal Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Enter focal length in centimeters to calculate diopter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter focal length in centimeters to calculate diopter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diyoptri hesaplamak için odak uzaklığını santimetre cinsinden girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brennweite in Zentimetern eingeben, um Dioptrien zu berechnen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez la distance focale en centimètres pour calculer la dioptrie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese la distancia focal en centímetros para calcular la dioptría.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أدخل البعد البؤري بالسنتيمتر لحساب الديوبتر.

inputs.label: Lens 1 Power
inputs.businessContext: Power of first thin lens in diopters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Power of first thin lens in diopters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci ince merceğin diyoptri cinsinden gücü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Leistung der ersten dünnen Linse in Dioptrien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance de la première lentille mince en dioptries.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia de la primera lente delgada en dioptrías.

inputs.label: Lens 2 Power
inputs.businessContext: Power of second thin lens in diopters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Power of second thin lens in diopters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci ince merceğin diyoptri cinsinden gücü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Leistung der zweiten dünnen Linse in Dioptrien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance de la deuxième lentille mince en dioptries.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia de la segunda lente delgada en dioptrías.

inputs.label: Original Prescription
inputs.businessContext: Lens power before vertex distance change (negative for myopia).

businessContext_i18n.en: Lens power before vertex distance change (negative for myopia).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köşe mesafesi değişikliğinden önceki mercek gücü (miyopi için negatif).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance de la lentille avant le changement de distance au sommet (négative pour la myopie).
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia de la lente antes del cambio de distancia al vértice (negativa para miopía).
businessContext_i18n.ar: قوة العدسة قبل تغيير مسافة القمة (سالبة لقصر النظر).

inputs.label: Vertex Distance Change
inputs.businessContext: Distance the lens is moved from the eye (in mm, positive if moved away).

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance the lens is moved from the eye (in mm, positive if moved away).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Merceğin gözden taşındığı mesafe (mm cinsinden, gözden uzaklaşıyorsa pozitif).
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand, um den die Linse vom Auge bewegt wird (in mm, positiv wenn vom Auge weg).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de déplacement de la lentille par rapport à l'œil (en mm, positive si éloignée).
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia que se mueve la lente desde el ojo (en mm, positivo si se aleja).
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة التي تتحركها العدسة من العين (مم، موجبة إذا ابتعدت).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
